description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python CI that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.6-3.10, pypy3), excluding pypy3 on windows-latest and macos-latest. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies with poetry, runs tests with py.test, performs type checks with pytest-mypy, verifies the dist package format with twine, and uploads coverage results to Coveralls if a token is provided.
